title: Thessaloniki, Central Macedonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Thessaloniki, Central Macedonia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.

Overview

Thessaloniki is a city in Central Macedonia with a population of 1,012,297. Greece’s second city with a rich Byzantine heritage, vibrant waterfront, and renowned culinary scene.
